title: hieracium bifidum subsp. moeanum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. moeanum, also known as Hieracium moeanum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hieracium moeanum include reducing inflammation and fighting against infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and hepatoprotective effects. Hieracium moeanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
